metadata.description: GTM skills for Claude Code and Codex — B2B data enrichment, prospecting, buying signals, CRM enrichment, and outbound automation powered by Explorium and Vibe Prospecting.

plugins.name: explorium-public-skills
plugins.description: Run B2B data enrichment, prospecting, outbound, and ABM campaigns as Claude Code skills or Codex plugins. Powered by Explorium's real-time data platform and Vibe Prospecting MCP server. Alternative to ZoomInfo, Apollo.io, Clearbit, and Clay for AI agent workflows.
